summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Unovia Consulting landing website. All backend APIs working perfectly (6/6 tests passed). Frontend displays correctly with all sections, navigation, and mobile responsiveness working. Contact form integration successful.
passed_tests: Frontend page loading and logo display
Navigation with sticky header and all nav links
Hero section with headline, tagline, and CTA buttons
About section with 10+ years expertise stats
Services section with all 5 services displayed
Team section with CA, MBA, and Kolkata cards
Contact section with correct contact details (Connect@unovia.in, +91 72786 71467)
Contact form functionality with all fields
Mobile responsive navigation with hamburger menu
